title: The Frog From The Fog
description: A Funny And Dumb Version Of The Man From The Fog
body:
The Frog From The Fog A Funny "Horror" Mod

Its Kinda Like The Man From The Fog But Instead Of A Man Its A Frog

Its also Kinda meh

Also There A New Ore Called Frogium

And A Sword With 4 Durability With 1500 Attack Dmg 

And Uh Hes A Frog


Not Much Else To Say . . .









Versions

0.0.5 Main Version For 1.20.1 Forge
